data.title: Greenberg Traurig Adds Prominent Litigators Michael Collyard and Peter Ihrig in Minneapolis
data.description: Collyard, known for obtaining the highest jury award ever recorded in Minnesota, is joining Greenberg Traurig, LLP in Minneapolis on April 29, 2026. This move bolsters the firm's Litigation Practice with the appointment of Michael A. Collyard and Peter Ihrig as new shareholders. This development is significant in legal circles, given Collyard's success in obtaining notable jury verdicts in Minnesota.

data.title: UNCG Launches Minerva's Health Chariot to Expand Access to Care
data.description: A new mobile unit, funded by UnitedHealthcare Community Plan of North Carolina, is providing primary and preventive services in eight counties in the Triad region. The initiative was unveiled by the University of North Carolina at Greensboro (UNCG) on April 29, 2026. The unit, named Minerva's Health, aims to reach and assist a wide range of individuals in the community with essential healthcare services.

data.title: Trulieve Announces Applications Filed for DEA Registration of State Licensed Medical Marijuana Businesses
data.description: In Tallahassee, Florida, on April 29, 2026, Trulieve Cannabis Corp. (CSE: TRUL) (OTCQX: TCNNF), a prominent cannabis company in the U.S., disclosed filing applications with the U.S. Drug Enforcement Administration (DEA). This step marks their commitment to compliance and expansion in the industry.

data.title: CUPE NL: Budget Misses the Mark Without Action on Wages
data.description: In St. John’s, Newfoundland, CUPE Newfoundland and Labrador has expressed approval of Budget 2025-2026 for its investments in public services. However, the key concern raised by the union is the issue of low wages. Stacey Lucas, Secretary-Treasurer and Regional Vice President of CUPE Newfoundland and Labrador, highlighted that while the budget allocates funds for projects, it overlooks the importance of adequately compensating the individuals essential for the success of these projects. The union emphasized that without addressing the wage concerns, the budget's plans may fall short. The province is urged to prioritize wage adjustments in order to effectively support the services and projects outlined.

data.title: In HelloNation Insurance Expert Gregg Blanchard of Palm Beach Gardens Clarifies Hurricane Deductibles
data.description: In Palm Beach Gardens, Florida, on April 29, 2026, residents are seeking clarity on when a hurricane deductible comes into effect as hurricane season approaches. An article by HelloNation sheds light on the functionality of hurricane deductibles, addressing the concerns of many homeowners in Palm Beach County. It is essential for residents to comprehend the workings of hurricane deductibles to ensure they are adequately prepared for potential losses during turbulent weather conditions.

data.title: Bitcoin price drops ahead of FOMC, sparking market concern. Will TradFi and spot ETF volumes help retain $70K support?
data.description: The price of Bitcoin is known to show increased volatility around the time of the Federal Open Market Committee (FOMC) meetings. This trend is currently evident as we approach the upcoming FOMC meeting. The key question is whether the significant buying from institutional investors will help maintain the support level at $70,000 for Bitcoin.

data.title: AI model Talkie-1930, trained on pre-1930 text with 13 billion parameters, shares insights on Hitler, stocks, and future trends.
data.description: Recently, a model named Talkie-1930 with 13 billion parameters was created. This model lacks knowledge about the internet, World War II, and modern politics. The outcomes of interactions with Talkie-1930 have been described as captivating, humorous, and at times, disturbing.

data.title: Celsius Founder Alex Mashinsky barred from crypto industry in FTC $10M settlement, down from $4.7B judgment.
data.description: The settlement reached marks a significant decrease from the original $4.7 billion verdict imposed on the Celsius founder.

data.title: American Council of Learned Societies Awards 2026 Mellon/ACLS Dissertation Innovation Fellowships
data.description: 50 early-career graduate students breaking new ground in doctoral research will receive support through the 2026 Mellon/ACLS Dissertation Innovation Fellows program. This initiative, backed by the American Council of Learned Societies (ACLS), aims to foster innovative research among doctoral students.

data.title: WORLD INSURANCE ASSOCIATES NAMES MIKE VINER AS NEW SURETY PRACTICE LEADER
data.description: Iselin, New Jersey - On April 29, 2026, World Insurance Associates LLC (World) disclosed that Mike Viner has taken on the position of the head of its surety practice. As one of the leading insurance brokerages in the United States, World focuses on various strategic initiatives under Viner's leadership. Viner's appointment aims to further strengthen the company's foothold in the market.

data.title: LINK price remains stagnant in neutral zone with unclear direction. Resistance levels will determine bullish/bearish trends.
data.description: Trading within a neutral range, Chainlink is currently showing mixed technical signals, presenting no definitive direction. The token is encountering crucial resistance levels, which will be pivotal in determining the dominance between the bullish and bearish sentiments.

data.title: NIBS Announces Speaker Lineup for 2026 Building Innovation Conference
data.description: The 2026 Building Innovation Conference will be held by the National Institute of Building Sciences (NIBS) in May at The Ritz-Carlton in Tysons Corner, McLean, Virginia. The event will showcase prominent leaders from the built environment sector.

data.title: These Earnings Suggest The Economy Remains In Good Shape
data.description: Strong Q1 results have bolstered trucking stocks, sparking optimism among investors. The earnings indicate a healthy economy, with figures pointing towards a bullish momentum in the market.

data.title: Meta Stock Edges Lower With Q1 Results Due. Here Are 2 Earnings Numbers To Watch.
data.description: Meta is anticipated to experience its most robust sales growth in five years, as forecasted by Wall Street. Despite this positive outlook, Meta's stock has slightly declined following the release of its Q1 results. Analysts are closely monitoring two key earnings figures to gauge the company's performance.

data.title: Powell Passes Torch But Isn't Going Anywhere; Rate Cuts On Ice (Live Coverage)
data.description: Federal Reserve Chair Powell's future remains uncertain as the central bank's policy direction is in a state of change. With data dependency and balance sheet policies in flux, the markets are closely watching for any adjustments. Despite passing the torch, Powell is not stepping down, and rate cuts are currently not on the table. Stay tuned for further updates on this developing situation.

data.title: Biogen Had A Nearly Perfect Sales Sweep, But One Beat Really Stood Out
data.description: Biogen surpassed Wall Street's projections for the first quarter, reporting exceptional sales performance from its growth products. The company significantly exceeded expectations, with sales outperforming forecasts across the board. This success was particularly highlighted by one standout beat in sales, showcasing Biogen's strong market position and performance in the industry.
